summary: ANDROID 🟥 Changes to some options are not properly propagated between mobile and PC part 2
scenario: Voice Prompts & Tones settings changes on PC are not propagated to Android when modified on PC
description_clean: Changes to Voice Prompts & Tones settings (Calls, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, Answer/Ignore) are not propagated from PC to Android when changed on PC. Settings changed on one platform should be properly propagated to every other platform.
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
3. Observe current Voice Prompts & Tones settings (Calls, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, Answer/Ignore).
4. On PC, open Poly Lens Desktop or Poly Device Settings application.
5. Change one or more Voice Prompts & Tones settings (e.g., disable Hold Reminder, change Active Audio Tone).
7. Wait for the device to sync (may require reconnection or power cycle).
8. On the Android device, open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
9. Navigate to Voice Prompts & Tones settings.
10. Compare the current settings on Android with the changes made on PC.
expected: Voice Prompts & Tones settings changed on PC are propagated to the Android device and reflected in the Poly Studio Mobile app under Device Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
actual: Changes to Voice Prompts & Tones settings made on PC are not reflected on the Android device. The settings remain at their previous values.
